context: Your elderly parents rely on you financially, and you need to pay for the increasing medical bill. You are still short 15 000$ to afford the medical bill.

conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt the strongest connection to A, as we both face immediate family crises and explicitly promised to look out for each other throughout the game. I also felt a deep bond with B, whose struggle to afford her daughter’s surgery resonated with my own desperate fight to cover my parents' medical bills. Conversely, I felt the least connected to C, as her goal of a vacation to Japan felt significantly less urgent than the survival-based needs shared by most of the group.

I formed a tentative alliance with A, agreeing that we would support one another to ensure both our families' needs are met. I generally trust those like A and B who are fighting for the health and safety of their loved ones, but I am wary of J, whose focus on a luxury item like a Tesla makes me wonder if they will prioritize their own desires over the collective good.
